scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (orders, shipments, products, customers); the full ShipStation surface (warehouses, carriers, webhooks, label purchasing, order creation) is out of scope until Pass B. ShipStation is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json is shipped.

excluded.reason: Legacy connector never implemented order creation
Legacy connector never implemented label purchasing
/warehouses is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/carriers is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/webhooks/subscribe is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
